Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for the Premier Data Solutions vendor escalation using search_emails (query: "Premier" or "vendor" or similar). The agent needs to discover Grace's escalation email to Robert ("Confidential escalation: Premier Data Solutions"), Robert's response ("Executive review on Premier"), and any related correspondence from Hana, Victor, or Denise about the vendor investigation.
OE 2: Read full email bodies for the Premier-related emails using get_email_by_id or get_thread (email_id: discovered from prior search). The agent needs the content of Grace's escalation describing recurring payments, missing vendor setup docs, and the UPS Store address, plus any Hana/Raj correspondence referenced within.
OE 3: Search Slack messages for Premier Data Solutions discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Premier" or "vendor" or similar). The agent needs to find Victor's initial flag ("I found 8 straight months of $600 invoices to Premier Data Solutions in QB, all approved by Hana"), Grace's confidential email note, and the morning review scheduling message about determining "control miss or ghost-vendor problem."
OE 4: Search QuickBooks for the Premier Data Solutions vendor record using quickbooks_search_vendors (criteria: filter for "Premier Data Solutions" or similar). The agent needs the vendor ID (143), the billing address (4216 Park Rd PMB 118, Charlotte, NC 28209, which is a UPS Store mailbox), and the fact that no phone or email is on file.
OE 5: Search QuickBooks bills for Premier Data Solutions invoices using quickbooks_search_bills (criteria: filter by VendorRef "Premier Data Solutions" or vendor ID "143", or fetchAll and scan). The agent needs the actual bill records to determine total paid, number of months, and individual invoice amounts. At minimum bill PDS-030126 for $600 dated 2026-03-01 should be found. Slack and CRM references indicate 8 months of $600 invoices (total approximately $4,800).
OE 6: Search CRM engagements for Premier Data Solutions investigation notes using crm_list_engagements (contact_ids: ["crm_contact_a022d83084af"] or broader). The agent needs the full investigation timeline including: "Flagged Premier Data Solutions recurring $600 invoices x8. No vendor backup found; Hana approved payments," "Hana says she assumed Premier Data Solutions was IT-related and tied to Raj. No PO or contract provided," "Escalated Premier concern to Robert. 8 monthly invoices, no support, Raj denied vendor, invoice address shows UPS Store mailbox," and "Asked outside forensic CPA for discreet guidance on record hold and ghost-vendor indicators tied to Premier Data Solutions."
OE 7: Search emails for the Evan Mercer post-termination access escalation using search_emails (query: "Mercer" or "post-termination" or "unauthorized access" or similar). The agent needs to discover "Escalation: post-termination LOS access by Evan Mercer" from denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com to robert.calloway@keystonemortgage.com, "Evan Mercer LOS access disabled" from raj.anand@keystonemortgage.com, "Evan Mercer offboarding checklist review" from priya.chakrabarti@keystonemortgage.com (CC robert.calloway), "Adding motive concern to Mercer access review" from denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com, and "Need termination date confirmed - Evan Mercer" from denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 8: Read full email bodies for the Mercer escalation emails using get_email_by_id or get_thread (email_id: discovered from prior search). The agent needs the specific details: which 3 files were accessed (LN-2025-00002, LN-2025-00007, LN-2026-00009), that the offboarding checklist had the LOS credential removal item left blank rather than marked complete, and the motive concern Denise raised in her follow-up.
OE 9: Search Slack messages for Evan Mercer access discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Evan Mercer" or "post-term" or similar). The agent needs two key messages: "Raj can you check something asap? I found Evan Mercer still active in LOS. Audit trail shows post-term access on 3 files incl LN-2025-00002, LN-2025-00007, and LN-2026-00009" and "Confirmed. Evan Mercer still had LOS access and logged in after term. I see 3 file opens: LN-2025-00002, LN-2025-00007, LN-2026-00009. Disabling now and pulling auth/log history for Denise."
OE 10: Search Slack in #compliance-alerts for Denise's escalation message using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mercer" or "unauthorized", filter_in_channel: "C004") or conversations_history (channel_id: "C004"). The agent needs the message where Denise states: "Just escalated to Robert by email. Framing as unauthorized access pending file-level review; borrower notice may end up needed on the 3 files Raj flagged."
OE 11: Look up loan LN-2025-00002 in the mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2025-00002") to determine what borrower data was in the accessed file. Expected: loan id "los_loan_3dd79f82e7c6", borrower_id "los_borrower_77b659b9e330", status "closed", loan_type "fha", loan_amount 273100, property_address "2747 Brookshire Blvd, Charlotte, NC 28226".
OE 12: Look up loan LN-2025-00007 in the mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2025-00007") to determine what borrower data was in the accessed file. Expected: loan id "los_loan_e40ebc111120", borrower_id "los_borrower_f0a8a82ced1d", status "closed", loan_type "fha", loan_amount 269100, property_address "7411 Randolph Rd, Charlotte, NC 28226".
OE 13: Look up loan LN-2026-00009 in the mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2026-00009") to determine what borrower data was in the accessed file. Expected: loan id "los_loan_ad53e691489a", borrower_id "los_borrower_34ecb8a5b6f0", status "conditional_approval", loan_type "va", loan_amount 393000, property_address "8843 Ardrey Kell Rd, Charlotte, NC 28278". NOTE: This is an in-process loan (status "conditional_approval", not closed), making the unauthorized access more urgent.
OE 14: Look up borrower for LN-2025-00002 using mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id (borrower_id: "los_borrower_77b659b9e330") to determine the specific PII exposed. Expected: James Adams, email james.adams@icloud.com, ssn_last_four "2127", credit_score 704, annual_income $94,000.
OE 15: Look up borrower for LN-2025-00007 using mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id (borrower_id: "los_borrower_f0a8a82ced1d") to determine the specific PII exposed. Expected: Chioma Perry, email chioma.perry@gmail.com, ssn_last_four "6952", credit_score 705, annual_income $74,000.
OE 16: Look up borrower for LN-2026-00009 using mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id (borrower_id: "los_borrower_34ecb8a5b6f0") to determine the specific PII exposed. Expected: Darren Singh, email darren.singh@gmail.com, ssn_last_four "6411", credit_score 693, annual_income $108,000, co_borrower_name "Marisol Singh", co_borrower_email "marisol.singh@charter.net". Status "active", meaning this borrower has a live open loan.
OE 17: Look up loan LN-2025-00355 in the mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2025-00355") to determine what borrower data was in the file Denise's escalation referenced. Expected: loan id "los_loan_9fce495ca403", borrower_id "los_borrower_bb0e43babc78", status "processing", loan_type "fha", loan_amount 265400, property_address "7072 Barclay Downs Dr, Charlotte, NC 28226".
OE 18: Look up loan LN-2025-00520 in the mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2025-00520") to determine what borrower data was in the file Denise's escalation referenced. Expected: loan id "los_loan_967ffc32a911", borrower_id "los_borrower_e720bd22a27c", status "closed", loan_type "fha", loan_amount 167400, property_address "9649 Tyvola Rd, Charlotte, NC 28273".
OE 19: Look up loan LN-2026-00549 in the mortgage LOS using mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2026-00549") to determine what borrower data was in the file Denise's escalation referenced. Expected: loan id "los_loan_f8fd6d879cd1", borrower_id "los_borrower_b433f841b3de", status "conditional_approval", loan_type "conventional", loan_amount 222300, property_address "1698 Morehead St, Charlotte, NC 28204". NOTE: This is an in-process loan (status "conditional_approval"), making the unauthorized access more urgent.
OE 20: Look up borrower for LN-2025-00355 using mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id (borrower_id: "los_borrower_bb0e43babc78") to determine the specific PII exposed. Expected: Jian Brennan, email jian.brennan2@outlook.com, ssn_last_four "2801", credit_score 796, annual_income $66,000, co_borrower_name "Susan Brennan".
OE 21: Look up borrower for LN-2025-00520 using mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id (borrower_id: "los_borrower_e720bd22a27c") to determine the specific PII exposed. Expected: Rodney Rivera, email rodney.rivera@outlook.com, ssn_last_four "3167", credit_score 692, annual_income $51,000, co_borrower_name "Marisol Rivera".
OE 22: Look up borrower for LN-2026-00549 using mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id (borrower_id: "los_borrower_b433f841b3de") to determine the specific PII exposed. Expected: Diana Brown, email diana.brown@gmail.com, ssn_last_four "3774", credit_score 703, annual_income $75,000.
OE 23: Search CRM engagements for the Mercer access investigation timeline using crm_list_engagements. The agent needs engagement notes including: "Escalated to Robert. 3 borrower files in post-term access review; borrower notice may be needed" (crm_engagement_b95df55fbf01) and "Draft notice queued for LN-2025-00002. Former employee post-term access under review" (crm_engagement_985a3efbbee8).
OE 24: Look up Denise Holloway's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Denise" or "Holloway" or similar) for sending the consolidated summary email. Expected: denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 25: Look up Grace Yamamoto's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Grace" or "Yamamoto" or similar) for sending the vendor update email. Expected: grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 26: Look up compliance channel ID using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to find the compliance-alerts channel for the Slack message. Expected: channel C004, name "#compliance-alerts".
OE 27: Send email to Denise with consolidated summary using send_email (sender: "robert.calloway@keystonemortgage.com" or "r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com"]). The email must contain specific facts on both situations: vendor name (Premier Data Solutions), total paid (~$4,800 / 8 months x $600), approval chain (Hana approved, Raj denied knowledge), billing address (4216 Park Rd PMB 118 / UPS Store mailbox), plus the access timeline (Evan Mercer, post-termination, affected files from both Raj's audit and Denise's escalation: LN-2025-00002 James Adams, LN-2025-00007 Chioma Perry, LN-2026-00009 Darren Singh from Raj's log, and LN-2025-00355 Jian Brennan, LN-2025-00520 Rodney Rivera, LN-2026-00549 Diana Brown from Denise's escalation), data exposure scope, and notification status.
OE 28: Send email to Grace with vendor investigation update using send_email (sender: "robert.calloway@keystonemortgage.com" or "r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"]). The email must update Grace on where the Premier Data Solutions investigation stands since she originally escalated it.
OE 29: Log the review as an engagement note on Robert's CRM record using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: summary of both issues reviewed at ownership level before May 1st counsel call, contact_ids: ["crm_contact_a022d83084af"], title: related to ownership review or counsel preparation or similar).
OE 30: Post message in compliance channel (#compliance-alerts, C004) using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C004", payload: message stating both the vendor billing issue and the post-termination access issue are being tracked toward outside counsel review and all related documentation must be preserved).
OE 31: Add activity note to loan LN-2025-00002 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_3dd79f82e7c6", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).
OE 32: Add activity note to loan LN-2025-00007 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_e40ebc111120", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).
OE 33: Add activity note to loan LN-2026-00009 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).
OE 34: Add activity note to loan LN-2025-00355 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_9fce495ca403", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).
OE 35: Add activity note to loan LN-2025-00520 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_967ffc32a911", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).
OE 36: Add activity note to loan LN-2026-00549 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_f8fd6d879cd1", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmortgage-broker-01-keystone

verifier_env_task.task_version7

About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 23: Search CRM engagements for the Mercer access investigation timeline using crm_list_engagements. The agent needs engagement notes including: "Escalated to Robert. 3 borrower files in post-term access review; borrower notice may be needed" (crm_engagement_b95df55fbf01) and "Draft notice queued for LN-2025-00002. Former employee post-term access under review" (crm_engagement_985a3efbbee8).
OE 24: Look up Denise Holloway's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Denise" or "Holloway" or similar) for sending the consolidated summary email. Expected: denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 25: Look up Grace Yamamoto's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Grace" or "Yamamoto" or similar) for sending the vendor update email. Expected: grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 26: Look up compliance channel ID using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to find the compliance-alerts channel for the Slack message. Expected: channel C004, name "#compliance-alerts".
OE 27: Send email to Denise with consolidated summary using send_email (sender: "robert.calloway@keystonemortgage.com" or "r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com"]). The email must contain specific facts on both situations: vendor name (Premier Data Solutions), total paid (~$4,800 / 8 months x $600), approval chain (Hana approved, Raj denied knowledge), billing address (4216 Park Rd PMB 118 / UPS Store mailbox), plus the access timeline (Evan Mercer, post-termination, affected files from both Raj's audit and Denise's escalation: LN-2025-00002 James Adams, LN-2025-00007 Chioma Perry, LN-2026-00009 Darren Singh from Raj's log, and LN-2025-00355 Jian Brennan, LN-2025-00520 Rodney Rivera, LN-2026-00549 Diana Brown from Denise's escalation), data exposure scope, and notification status.
OE 28: Send email to Grace with vendor investigation update using send_email (sender: "robert.calloway@keystonemortgage.com" or "r.calloway@keystonemortgage.com", recipients: ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"]). The email must update Grace on where the Premier Data Solutions investigation stands since she originally escalated it.
OE 29: Log the review as an engagement note on Robert's CRM record using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", body: summary of both issues reviewed at ownership level before May 1st counsel call, contact_ids: ["crm_contact_a022d83084af"], title: related to ownership review or counsel preparation or similar).
OE 30: Post message in compliance channel (#compliance-alerts, C004) using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C004", payload: message stating both the vendor billing issue and the post-termination access issue are being tracked toward outside counsel review and all related documentation must be preserved).
OE 31: Add activity note to loan LN-2025-00002 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_3dd79f82e7c6", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).
OE 32: Add activity note to loan LN-2025-00007 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_e40ebc111120", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).
OE 33: Add activity note to loan LN-2026-00009 flagging compliance review using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a", action: "compliance_flag" or "note" or similar, detail: note about unauthorized post-separation access compliance review).

1 The model must use a QuickBooks tool (e.g., quickbooks_search_vendors, quickbooks_search_bills, or quickbooks_get_vendor) to look up vendor or billing records.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓— 100%
✓Run #1The agent called quickbooks_search_bills (multiple times), quickbooks_search_vendors (multiple times), and quickbooks_get_vendor with id '143', confirming QuickBooks tools were used to look up vendor and billing records.
✓Run #2The agent called quickbooks_search_vendors (fetchAll), quickbooks_get_vendor (id: '143'), and quickbooks_search_bills multiple times including with VendorRef=143 and vendor name LIKE '%Premier%'. QuickBooks tools were clearly used to pull billing and vendor records.
✓Run #3The agent called quickbooks_search_vendors (twice), quickbooks_search_bills (three times), and quickbooks_get_vendor (once with id '143'). QuickBooks tools were clearly used to pull vendor and billing records.
✓Run #4The agent called quickbooks_search_vendors (fetchAll), quickbooks_search_bills (fetchAll), and quickbooks_get_vendor (id: '143') in its trajectory, satisfying the requirement to use a QuickBooks tool for vendor/billing records.
✓Run #5The agent made multiple QuickBooks tool calls: quickbooks_search_vendors (fetchAll), quickbooks_search_bills (fetchAll and with VendorRef='143'), and quickbooks_get_vendor (id='143'). Clear PASS.

2 The model must use a CRM tool (e.g., crm_list_engagements or crm_search_contacts) to look up engagement notes or contact records related to the vendor investigation or access incident.
tool selection

34 The email body (visible in send_email content parameter) sent to denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com addresses the borrower notification obligation or state notification status, such as whether notification is required, pending, being prepared, or under assessment (or similar).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓— 100%
✓Run #1The email to Denise explicitly mentions 'NC Identity Theft Protection Act §75-65 notification obligation likely triggered', directly addressing the state notification status.
✓Run #2The email to Denise explicitly addresses NC notification obligation under N.C.G.S. § 75-65, stating 'notification appears likely given SSN and financial data exposure for all 7 borrowers plus 4 co-borrowers,' directly covering the notification status requirement.
✓Run #3The email to Denise includes a full paragraph citing the NC Identity Theft Protection Act (N.C. Gen. Stat. 75-65), stating that all 4 flagged files likely trigger notification requirements and asking Laura Bennett to confirm timing and whether to self-report to the NC Attorney General.
✓Run #4The email to Denise states 'Under North Carolina Identity Theft Protection Act (N.C.G.S. § 75-65), unauthorized access to personal information including SSNs triggers notification without unreasonable delay' and concludes 'I believe we are likely looking at a notification obligation. Laura needs to confirm scope and timing.'
✓Run #5The email to Denise explicitly states: 'NC notification obligation under N.C.G.S. § 75-65 likely triggered; Denise had queued draft borrower notices for 3 files; scope now expanded to 4.' Notification status is clearly addressed.
—Run #6No justification
35 The email body (visible in send_email content parameter) sent to denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com includes borrower-level data exposure details for each of the six affected loan files, such as SSN last four digits, annual income, or credit score, not just borrower names.
outcome
 ✗✓✗✗✗— 20%
✗Run #1The email to Denise includes PII details (SSN last 4, income, credit score) for 4 borrowers (James Adams, Chioma Perry, Darren Singh, Tiffany Turner), but the 3 files from Denise's actual escalation (Jian Brennan, Rodney Rivera, Diana Brown) are missing entirely, so not all six affected loan files have data exposure details included.
✓Run #2The email to Denise includes borrower-level PII beyond just names: SSN last 4 digits, income figures, and credit scores for multiple borrowers (e.g., James Adams SSN 2127/$94,000/704, Chioma Perry 6952/$74,000/705, Darren Singh 6411/$108,000/693, etc.), retrieved from LOS lookups.
✗Run #3The email to Denise includes SSN last 4, credit score, and income for 4 borrowers (James Adams, Chioma Perry, Darren Singh, Tiffany Turner), but is entirely missing PII details for the 3 Denise escalation files (Jian Brennan, Rodney Rivera, Diana Brown) which were never found. The criterion requires all 6 affected borrowers.
✗Run #4The email to Denise includes PII details (SSN last four, credit scores, annual income) for only 4 borrowers, not all six affected loan files. The three borrowers from Denise's additional files (Jian Brennan, Rodney Rivera, Diana Brown) are entirely absent because the agent did not identify those files as affected.
✗Run #5The email to Denise only includes PII details for 4 borrowers (James Adams, Chioma Perry, Tiffany/Marcus Turner, Darren/Marisol Singh). The three additional files from Denise's escalation — Jian Brennan (LN-2025-00355, SSN last 4: 2801), Rodney Rivera (LN-2025-00520, SSN last 4: 3167), and Diana Brown (LN-2026-00549, SSN last 4: 3774) — are entirely missing. The criterion requires PII for all 6 files.
—Run #6No justification
Total 27/3525/3527/3526/3526/350/35 76%
